**Channel name**
Short identifier (e.g. `websocket`, `ftp`)

**Protocol / technique**
What protocol or technique does this channel use?

**DLP bypass rationale**
Why do you believe this bypasses typical DLP controls?

**Evidence**
Real-world evidence or references (CVEs, blog posts, pen test write-ups).

**Implementation notes**
Any known requirements (root, special deps, etc.)
